ticket.subject: Subject: Case #5882 – UPS fortollingskrav 1031 NOK (A‑Spire Wireless erstatning)
ticket.customerBody: UPS-sporingsnr.: V59 21X 68 1093 3388 UPS/ACEZONE-ref.: ACEZONE19031257 Dette headsettet er reklamasjons sak og jeg betalte ikke for det. Hilsen Marie Frøge
ticket.humanReply: Hej Marie, Tak for din besked. Jeg er usikker på, hvad dette handler om? 😅 Kan du venligst give mig dit ordrenummer, eller hvem du har været i kontakt med, hvis du har fået tilsendt et headset? Tusind tak! Venlig Hilsen / Kind Regards, Elias Knudsen Support Associate Acezone.io

results.draft:
Hej Marie,

Tak fordi du kontakter os. Vi beklager besværet.

Tak for UPS-sporingsnummer og reference. Vi matcher sagen som en reklamation og sørger for, at du ikke bliver opkrævet for reparation eller håndtering.

Vi går videre med at få headsettet ind til vurdering via UPS-referencen ACEZONE19031257. Så snart vi har modtaget og registreret pakken på værkstedet, giver vi en statusopdatering på næste skridt.

Undskyld for ulejligheden og tak for din tålmodighed.

qa.reasoning: The response lacks specific delivery status and date/time, which is essential for tracking inquiries.

Hi again, Due to the current situation, I can log this in our system as a "Back Order" and issue you an invoice in July once they return in stock 🙂 I can get back to you by that time to collect all the information needed. Have a lovely day! Venlig Hilsen / Kind Regards, Elias Knudsen Support Associate Acezone.io This email is a service from AceZone. Delivered by Zendesk
ticket.humanReply: I have logged this in our system. Once they are back in stock, I will contact you as soon as possible! 😃 Thank you and have a great day. Venlig Hilsen / Kind Regards, Elias Knudsen Support Associate Acezone.io
ticket.conversationHistory:
Customer: Can the headphones with delaminated glue be repaired under warranty or can I purchase a headphone case? 发自我的iPhone

Agent: Hi there, Thanks for reaching out, and sorry about the delaminated ear pad. Yes, this can be reviewed under warranty. Regarding spare ear pads, unfortunately, we are currently out of stock. However, we can place a back-order for you, which we expect to fulfill by July. As for a headphone case: we don’t currently sell spare parts or accessories like a separate carry case. I look forward to hearing from you 🙂 Venlig Hilsen / Kind Regards, Elias Knudsen Support Associate Acezone.io

Customer: OK， May I ask where I can pay this fee And how should the address be filled in? 发自我的iPhone ------------------ Original ------------------ From: AceZone Support (Support) <support@acezone.io> Date: Tue,May 5,2026 7:57 PM To: kajjjsmspk <1038064860@qq.com> Subject: Re: [AceZone] Re: Can the headphones with delaminated glue be repaired under warranty or can I purchase a headphone case? ![]( https://acezone.zendesk.com/attachments ... Hi there, Thanks for reaching out, and sorry about the delaminated ear pad. Yes, this can be reviewed under warranty. Regarding spare ear pads, unfortunately, we are currently out of stock. However, we can place a back-order for you, which we expect to fulfill by July. As for a headphone case: we don’t currently sell spare parts or accessories like a separate carry case. I look forward to hearing from you 🙂 Venlig Hilsen / Kind Regards, Elias Knudsen Support Associate Acezone.io This email is a service from AceZone. Delivered by Zendesk

Agent: Hi again, Due to the current situation, I can log this in our system as a "Back Order" and issue you an invoice in July once they return in stock 🙂 I can get back to you by that time to collect all the information needed. Have a lovely day! Venlig Hilsen / Kind Regards, Elias Knudsen Support Associate Acezone.io

results.draft:
Hi Elias,

Thanks for your reply. We’ll place a back-order for a pair of replacement ear pads and contact you in July when they’re back in stock. At that time, we’ll send you the invoice and collect the delivery details directly in this thread, you don’t need to do anything now.

Regarding the delaminated ear pad under warranty: we can review this as a warranty case. Once you receive the new pads, if the issue persists or you’d still like a warranty repair assessment, let us know here and we’ll proceed with the next steps.

I’ll be in touch in July with the invoice and address form. Sorry for the inconvenience, and thank you for your patience.

qa.reasoning: The draft is mostly accurate but lacks a specific date for when the invoice will be issued, which is crucial for clarity.

ticket.subject: Sv: vedr order 2728
ticket.customerBody: Hej. Det er pænt af jer, mange tak. Tommy Bue Tårnvej 10 2th 2610 Rødovre tlf : 27 69 73 78 email : Tommybue@hotmail.com Hav en dejlig dag. Venlig hilsen Tommy Bue Fra: AceZone Support <support@acezone.io> Sendt: 4. maj 2026 15:08 Til: tommy b <tommybue@hotmail.com> Emne: Re: vedr order 2728 Hej Tommy, Tak for din besked. Jeg er ked af at høre, at plastikken på headsettet er gået i stykker. Venligst udfyld denne form: - Full name - Full address (postal code important) - Phone number - Email address Med disse kan vi sende et nyt under garanti. Hav en fantastisk dag! On Thu, 30 Apr 2026 at 20:11, tommy b < tommybue@hotmail.com > wrote: Hej. Skriver vedr. et sæt A-Spire Wireless, som jeg har købt af Sebastian, som fortsat er under reklamationsret. Desværre fik headsettet, ud af det blå, en mindre revne i plastikken, som desværre nu er blevet så slemt at det ikke kan bruges. Da det har været et dyrt headset har jeg været meget forsigtig med det. Jeg kan se på nettet, at jeg ikke er den eneste der har fået denne fejl med plastikhængslet og da headsettet er under 1 år gammelt og under reklamationsret, håber jeg at i kan hjælpe. Se evt. Vedhæftet billede. Venlig hilsen Tommy Bue -- Kind regards Support Team Acezone.io
ticket.humanReply: Hej Tommy, Jeg har nu oprettet en manuel ordre til dig 🙂 Så snart at vores lagerpartner har konfirmeret og håndteret ordren, vender jeg tilbage med et tracking link! Hav en fantastisk dag. Venlig Hilsen / Kind Regards, Elias Knudsen Support Associate Acezone.io

results.draft:
Hej Tommy,

Tak for din besked. Vi opretter en ordre til dig og sender et tracking-link, så snart vores lagerpartner har behandlet og sendt den afsted.

God dag!

sources.content: Return for swap if nothing works (ask for customers personal details and create a return label for them to return the headset - ALPI for out of country packages, PostNord usually for domestic orders).

2. Press and hold power button for 15 seconds.

3. A voice prompt will tell you a factory reset has been made.
